IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (32308556.pdf)
SUMMARY: Dedicated to every project with strong undergraduate and graduate credentials, including five years of experience in assisting management of human resources. Seeking to expand knowledge through a Doctorate in business program and operate in industries such as Manufacturing, Government, and Healthcare.
SKILLS: Human Resource Management, Product Design and Development, Strategic Warehouse Management, Marketing Management, Economics, Leadership Organizations, Operations Management, Quantitative Methods, Managerial Accounting, Finance, Strategic Management, Conflict resolution, Self-motivated, Process implementation, Staff development, Client assessment and analysis, Budgeting and finance, Team liaison
